title: KODO Health Score
description: Single-line JSON emitted by kodo-health.sh. This is the immutable ground truth evaluator consumed by kodo-heartbeat.sh. Schema changes require a version bump and a HEARTBEAT.md update.

version.description: Schema version. Increment only when signal weights or cohort formula change.

captured_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when kodo-health.sh started its read.

trial_wallclock_s.description: Wall-clock seconds kodo-health.sh spent collecting. Used by heartbeat to detect its own slowness.

health_score.description: Global scalar in [0,1]. Higher is better. Computed as 1.0 minus weighted penalties. See kodo-health.sh for the exact formula — weights are public and deterministic.

stuck_events_ratio.description: Fraction of in-flight pipeline_state rows whose updated_at is older than 10 minutes and whose state is not terminal. Catches the do_triaging no-op loop.

loop_rate_per_min.description: Count of 'stuck after N re-dispatches' lines appearing in brain.log within the last 60 seconds. Catches the monitoring-loop pathology directly.

schema_drift_errors_1h.description: Count of 'no such column' / 'no such table' SQLite errors observed across all logs in the last hour.

db_lock_errors_1h.description: Count of 'database is locked' errors across all logs in the last hour.

llm_failure_rate_1h.description: Fraction of LLM invocations in the last hour that logged 'invocation failed'. Denominator is total invocations observed.

deferred_growth_1h.description: Net change in (pipeline_state WHERE state='deferred') + deferred_queue row count, over the last hour. Positive means the backlog is growing.

successful_resolutions_1h.description: Events that reached resolved/published/reported in the last hour. Observed for cohort scoring, not rewarded in the global scalar.

pm_schema_violation_rate.description: Fraction of pm.log content in the last hour that matches free-text contamination patterns (bare URLs, missing JSON braces on schema-tagged invocations). Catches the PM raw-URL bug.

merge_incident_rate_30d.description: From merge_outcome_stats_30d view. Slow signal — used for weekly ratchet, not per-trial decisions.

cohorts.description: Per-domain health scalars in [0,1]. Allow heartbeat to localize interventions to dev/mkt/pm independently.

counts.description: Raw tallies. Heartbeat logs these for post-hoc debugging but does not use them in the ratchet formula.
